name: Imaginary Friend: Dodoco
description: A lovely ornament modeled after Klee's imaginary friend Dodoco.\nThere may be many Dodocos in the Dodo Clan, but in Klee's eyes, every single one is unique. Each has a different appearance, a different personality, and each is one of her very best friends!\n"Real or imaginary, it's nice to grow up with friends by your side."
